articles.title: Welcome to MySpark+
articles.summary: Get the lay of the land in under two minutes.

body.text: MySpark+ runs your client records, appointments, payments, and communications from one place. This guide gives you the lay of the land so you find what you need fast.
What you can do here

items: Book and manage appointments on the calendar
Track every client interaction and visit history
Take payments and run point of sale
Send automatic confirmation emails and reminders
Configure public booking widgets for your website
Run reports on revenue, services, and staff performance

body.text: Finding your way around
The left menu is your home base. Calendar sits at the top for fast booking. Clients, Payments, and Reports follow. Settings and admin tools live at the bottom.
The top toolbar has global search. Use it to jump to any client, appointment, or invoice from anywhere in the app.
Bookmark the URL of any section in your browser. Routing is path-based so direct links work every time.

articles.title: Booking your first appointment
articles.summary: Step-by-step for creating a new appointment from scratch.

body.text: Booking an appointment takes under a minute once you know the flow. Here is how.
Quick steps

items: Click Calendar in the left menu
Click the + Schedule button at the top right
Pick Service for a service from your catalog, or Custom for a one-off meeting
Select the client, the service, the staff member, and the time slot
Add notes if needed
Click Save

body.text: Service vs Custom

Service appointments pull from your service catalog. Pricing, duration, and tax follow what you set up in Settings. Custom appointments are free-form blocks of time with whatever name and duration you want.
End time behavior
When you change the start time of an appointment, the end time shifts with it to keep the duration intact. If you want a longer or shorter slot, edit the end time after.
Drag any appointment on the calendar to reschedule it. The system checks for conflicts and warns you before saving.

articles.title: Searching and updating client records
articles.summary: Find clients fast, edit their info, and track their history.

body.text: Your client list grows fast. These shortcuts keep you moving.
Finding a client

items: Click Clients in the left menu
Type a name, phone number, or email in the search bar
Click the result that matches

body.text: The top toolbar search works the same way from any screen in the app.
Adding a new client

items: From the Clients page, click + Add Client
Fill in name, email, and phone
Add any custom fields you want to track
Click Save

body.text: Editing client details
Open any client record and click Edit to update their info. Visit history, appointments, payments, and notes show on tabs across the top of the record.
Tag your clients to group them. You filter by tag from the client list later for follow-ups or marketing campaigns.

articles.title: Taking a payment
articles.summary: Two ways to take money. From an appointment, or from the POS register.

body.text: MySpark+ takes payments two ways. From an appointment after the service ends, or from the POS register for walk-ins and product sales.
From an appointment

items: Open the appointment on the calendar
Click the Checkout button
Confirm the line items and total
Pick a payment method (Card, Cash, Card on File, Gift Card, or Other)
For card payments, swipe or enter the card details
Click Complete

body.text: From the POS register

items: Click Payments in the left menu
Click New Sale
Add services, products, or custom line items
Apply coupons or discounts if needed
Pick the client (optional for walk-ins)
Take payment the same way as appointments

body.text: Tax and tips
Tax applies to taxable line items based on your tax settings. Tips come after tax and go to the staff member assigned to the appointment by default.
Receipts email automatically when the client has an email on file. You can also send or print a receipt from the payment record at any time.

articles.title: Setting up your service catalog
articles.summary: Configure the services your business offers. The backbone of every booking.

body.text: Your service catalog drives every booking. Take the time to set it up right.
Adding a service

items: Click Services in the left menu
Click + Add Service
Fill in name, price, and duration
Pick a category (or create a new one)
Set tax and availability rules
Click Save

body.text: Pricing and duration
Set a default price and duration for each service. Both can be overridden when you book an appointment if you need flexibility.
Variations and add-ons

Variations are different versions of the same service. A haircut with three lengths is one service with three variations. Add-ons are extras a client picks alongside the main service, like a deep conditioner or aromatherapy upgrade.
Taxable flag
Mark services as taxable based on your local rules. Tax applies at checkout for any service flagged as taxable when your tax settings are on.
Avoid deleting a service that has historical appointments tied to it. Mark it inactive instead. Inactive services stay in reports and history but hide from new bookings.

articles.title: Configuring your public booking widget
articles.summary: Let clients book themselves online with a widget tuned for your services.

body.text: Your booking widget lets clients book themselves online. You can have multiple widgets, each tuned for a different service or scenario.
Creating a widget

items: Go to Settings, then Booking Widgets
Click + New Widget
Pick the widget type that fits your use case
Configure services, staff, payment, and branding
Click Save

body.text: Three widget types
Service Calendar lets clients pick a service first, then a staff member and time. Use this for medspa, salon, or wellness bookings.
Appointment Calendar lets clients pick a staff member first, then a meeting type. Use this for consultations and established patient follow-ups.
Class Calendar shows upcoming class sessions. Clients register for the ones they want. Use this for group fitness, yoga, or workshops.
Customizing the look
Each widget has its own primary color, logo, and confirmation message. Style it to match your brand so it feels like part of your website.
Going live
Once saved, your widget gets a unique URL on book.mysparkplus.app. Embed it as an iframe on your site, or link to it from social posts and email signatures.
Test bookings with a real card on the widget before sending traffic. Confirm the email confirmation, the calendar shows the appointment, and the payment landed correctly.

articles.title: Adding staff and managing schedules
articles.summary: Add team members, set their working hours, and assign roles.

body.text: Staff members log in to manage their own bookings and clients. Set them up right and they hit the ground running.
Adding a staff member

items: Go to Settings, then Staff
Click + Add Staff
Enter name, email, and a temporary password
Pick their role (Admin or Staff)
Set their working hours
Assign a calendar color
Click Save

body.text: Roles

Admins see everything and manage settings, services, staff, and reports. Staff see their own appointments, their clients, and the POS register. They cannot change services, settings, or other staff records.
Setting their schedule
Each staff member has a weekly schedule of available hours by day. Set the recurring hours first, then add date overrides for time off, half-days, or special hours.
Date overrides
Use date overrides for vacation, sick days, or unusual hours. Overrides take priority over the regular schedule. Block a full day or shift the hours for that one day only.
Calendar colors help you scan the day view fast. Assign each staff member a distinct color and the calendar reads at a glance.

articles.title: Tax, tips, and payment settings
articles.summary: Configure how your business takes money. Affects every payment.

body.text: Configure how your business takes money. These settings affect every payment your team processes.
Setting up sales tax

items: Go to Settings, then Payments
Toggle Tax to On
Enter your local tax rate as a percentage
Enter the label you want on receipts (Tax, Sales Tax, GST, etc.)
Click Save

body.text: Tax applies only to line items flagged as taxable. Tips, fees, gift card sales, and account credits never get taxed.
Tipping options
Enable tips for appointment checkouts and POS sales. Set default tip percentages (10, 15, 20 is standard). Clients can pick a preset or enter a custom amount.
Square integration
Connect your Square account from the Payments settings to take card payments. MySpark+ uses Square for processing. Your Square credentials stay secure and never leak through the booking widget.
Receipts

Customize the email receipt your clients get after payment. Add your business name, address, refund policy, and any thank-you message. Receipts send automatically when the client has an email on file.
